reviews.comment:
Un camping amplio para socios, con muy frondosa vegetación y quinchos   Con fauna exótica de ardillas, un tanto que rompen un equilibrio ecológico por sus hábitos de roer cosas que no deben

(Translated by Google)
A spacious campsite for members, with lush vegetation and barbecue areas. It has an exotic squirrel population, which somewhat disrupts the ecological balance due to their habit of gnawing on things they shouldn't.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnNS1lTEJnEAE
